summary: Exceptional tape-to-digital transfer delivering warm, tape‑like sound; the recording quality is praised as excellent despite no performance details.
review: Both reviewers give five stars and focus on the superb transfer from master tapes, noting a rich, tape‑like character and asking about the gear used. They confirm the source is from original tapes (not DSD) and express high satisfaction with the sound quality, while offering no commentary on the musical performance.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently enthusiastic 5‑star reviews praising the transfer and source; recording quality is highlighted as outstanding, though no show details are provided.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Warm, tape-like sound; excellent transfer from master tapes, no DSD used, high clarity and fidelity noted by reviewers.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on the performance or setlist were provided in the reviews.
